sections.title: TKG Advisory & Assessment
sections.description: Start your Tanzu Kubernetes Grid journey with confidence. Our experts assess your current vSphere and cloud infrastructure, plan seamless TKG adoption, and design a scalable architecture optimized for your environment.
offerings: Conduct infrastructure audits and plan TKG adoption.
Create a roadmap for efficient TKG deployment on vSphere or public clouds.
Provide detailed cost analysis and workload optimization.

sections.title: Application Development & Migration
sections.description: Modernize your workloads with TKG-native applications and migrate monoliths into containerized microservices for better agility and performance across your VMware environment.
offerings: Develop TKG-ready applications using Go, Java, and Python.
Break monolithic architectures into resilient microservices.
Implement centralized management across multi-cluster TKG environments.

sections.title: TKG Deployment & Operations
sections.description: Deploy production-grade Tanzu Kubernetes Grid clusters on vSphere or in the cloud with high availability, resilience, and observability built in.
offerings: Provision auto-healing TKG clusters using Tanzu CLI and Infrastructure-as-Code tools.
Integrate observability with Prometheus, Grafana, and Thanos.
Automate cluster scaling, upgrades, and security policies.

sections.title: DevSecOps, Security & Compliance
sections.description: Shift security left in your TKG lifecycle. Our DevSecOps services ensure compliance and security at every layer of your containerized VMware environment.
offerings: Implement role-based access control (RBAC) and network segmentation.
Automate container image scanning with tools like Trivy and Harbor.
Ensure compliance with ISO, HIPAA, and GDPR standards.

sections.title: Enterprise TKG Support & Training
sections.description: AppsCode provides continuous TKG support, training, and managed services to ensure operational excellence and long-term stability.
offerings: Real-time monitoring, backup, and disaster recovery using Stash.
Training for DevOps teams to manage TKG independently.
Cost management and resource optimization for TKG clusters.

faq.question: What do your VMware Tanzu Kubernetes Grid Consulting Services include?
faq.answer: Our TKG Consulting Services cover the full lifecycle of designing, deploying, and managing Tanzu Kubernetes Grid clusters. From architecture design, cluster provisioning, and CI/CD integration to monitoring, scaling, and optimization, we help organizations run reliable and secure containerized workloads at scale on VMware TKG.

faq.question: What is VMware Tanzu Kubernetes Grid (TKG)?
faq.answer: VMware Tanzu Kubernetes Grid (TKG) is an enterprise-ready Kubernetes runtime that enables you to run Kubernetes on vSphere and public clouds. It provides a consistent, upstream-compatible Kubernetes experience with integrated networking, storage, and security powered by the VMware stack.

faq.question: Which technologies and practices are used in TKG consulting?
faq.answer: We leverage Tanzu CLI, Cluster API, Helm charts, containerization, CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code (Terraform, Crossplane), observability (Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry), and hybrid/multi-cloud deployment patterns to ensure scalable and resilient TKG environments.

faq.question: Can you work with our existing TKG clusters or VMware infrastructure?
faq.answer: Yes, we integrate with your current TKG clusters, vSphere environment, and workloads. We optimize performance, implement best practices, and guide teams in building production-ready, secure, and maintainable TKG deployments.

faq.question: What is the typical timeline and engagement model for TKG Consulting Services?
faq.answer: Engagements typically begin with a 1–2 week assessment phase to understand your VMware environment and requirements. Implementation follows in 4–8 week agile sprints. We offer flexible engagement models including fixed-scope projects, time-and-materials consulting, or long-term TKG advisory partnerships.

faq.question: Do you support hybrid and multi-cloud TKG deployments?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Our TKG Consulting Services are designed for portability and consistency across on-premises vSphere clusters and public clouds such as AWS, Azure, and GCP, ensuring seamless operations and scalability across environments.

faq.question: How do you ensure security, reliability, and operational efficiency in TKG?
faq.answer: We enforce security best practices including RBAC, network policies, secrets management, and vulnerability scanning, leveraging VMware NSX for advanced network security. Reliability is ensured with monitoring, backup/recovery strategies, and disaster resilience patterns. Operational efficiency is achieved through automation, CI/CD integration, and resource optimization.

faq.question: What happens after TKG consulting and implementation?
faq.answer: After deployment, we provide ongoing operational guidance, monitoring, performance tuning, and scaling recommendations. Our TKG Consulting Services also include training, knowledge transfer, and best practice documentation for your teams.

faq.question: How much do VMware TKG Consulting Services cost, and what are the pricing models?
faq.answer: Costs vary depending on the complexity of your clusters, number of workloads, and support needs. We offer fixed-scope projects, hourly engagements, and long-term consulting retainers. A detailed proposal is provided after the assessment phase.
